overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Bloodborne showing a hunter character in a long coat walking through a snowy gothic cathedral courtyard at night. The character approaches an outer gate, crosses an open courtyard filled with statues and dead trees under a full moon, and enters a massive cathedral through ornate wooden doors.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic cathedral outer gate approach with snow-covered stairs

events.description: character begins ascending the wide snow-covered stone stairs toward the gate
passing through the iron portcullis gate into the inner courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the snow-covered stairs toward the massive gothic gate with weapon drawn

entered.detail: massive stone gate structure with iron portcullis and gothic arches
wide stone staircase covered in snow leading up to the gate
stone walls with hanging icicles lining the stair approach
lit wall-mounted torches providing warm orange light against the blue snow

segments.scene_description: The hunter approaches a massive gothic cathedral gate from the bottom of a wide snow-covered staircase. Icicle-covered stone ramparts line both sides of the stairs, with lit torches providing the only warm light in the cold blue night. The character steadily ascends toward the iron portcullis.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy courtyard with scattered statues and dead trees under moonlight

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full moon and towering cathedral spires against the night sky
camera returns to forward-facing position to continue crossing the courtyard

agents.ego_description: pausing to look up at the full moon while standing in the snowy courtyard surrounded by statues

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the clear night sky above the cathedral towers
twisted black bare trees with no leaves scattered throughout the courtyard
tall stone statues of robed figures standing in the snow
tall spired towers of the cathedral rising against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Having passed through the gate, the scene opens into a wide snowy courtyard. The camera pans up to reveal a brilliant full moon and towering gothic spires against the dark sky. Dead leafless trees and stone statues of robed figures dot the snow-covered landscape, creating an eerie, desolate atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: inner courtyard with statue garden approaching main cathedral entrance

events.description: passing a large multi-figure stone monument with glowing elements on the right side
beginning final ascent up stairs toward the massive wooden cathedral doors

agents.ego_description: walking through the snowy courtyard past various stone statues and dead trees toward the cathedral entrance

entered.detail: massive ornate wooden doors with carved religious figures and metal studs
large golden-hued monument with multiple robed figures on a raised platform

segments.scene_description: The hunter continues across the expansive snowy courtyard, weaving between stone statues and dead trees. A large ornate monument with golden statues stands to the right. The massive wooden cathedral doors grow larger in the center of the frame as the character approaches the final staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral entrance vestibule with torchlit interior

events.description: passing through the massive carved wooden doors into the cathedral interior
transition from blue moonlight to warm orange torchlight inside the building

agents.ego_description: climbing the final stairs and walking through the massive carved wooden doors into the torchlit cathedral interior

entered.detail: intricately carved wooden door panels with religious figures and ornate patterns
smooth stone floor tiles inside the cathedral entrance
lit torches mounted on the interior stone walls providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The hunter climbs the final snow-dusted stairs and approaches the massive carved wooden doors. The doors open to reveal a torchlit interior with smooth stone floors. The transition from the cold blue exterior to the warm orange interior lighting marks the entry into the cathedral proper.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a frozen exterior ascent into the warm, torchlit depths of a gothic cathedral. It begins at the base of a wide, snow-covered staircase, ascending past icicle-covered ramparts and flickering torches toward a heavy iron portcullis. As the hunter passes through the gate, the scene opens into a desolate, moonlit courtyard where the camera pans upward to reveal towering spires and a brilliant full moon hanging over leafless trees and stone statues. The camera then tracks across the expansive snowy grounds, passing a golden monument before centering on the massive carved wooden doors at the top of a final set of stairs. Finally, the doors swing open, shifting the atmosphere from the cold blue night to the warm orange glow of a torchlit interior with smooth stone floors.
